title: Beef Cutlet Victoria Sponge Cake
description: A quirky British dessert featuring a moist Victoria sponge cake with a beef cutlet filling, served hot. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional British desserts, made with ayurvedic-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Maida flour
ingredients.notes: All-purpose flour used to make the sponge cake

ingredients.name: Beef cutlet
ingredients.notes: Pan-seared beef cutlet used to fill the cake

ingredients.name: Ghee
ingredients.notes: Used to make the sponge cake

instructions: Whisk together the maida flour, sugar, eggs, and yogurt in a large bowl.
Add the ghee and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch round cake pan and bake for 25 minutes.
Allow the cake to cool completely before slicing it in half horizontally.
Pan-fry the beef cutlet in a non-stick pan until cooked through.
Assemble the cake by spreading the raspberry jam on the bottom half of the cake and topping it with the beef cutlet.
Top the beef cutlet with the top half of the cake and serve hot.
Garnish the cake with chopped almonds and serve immediately.
